description: A short LLM-written prose summary of Ethan's coding over the last 7 days, derived from the same GitHub + WakaTime activity. Plain third-person paragraph — quote it directly when summarizing what he's currently working on.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu logged 28 hrs 12 mins of coding time, with a daily average of 4 hrs 30 mins. His work was mostly in Python, Markdown, and TypeScript, with some SQL. The data shows activity across 3 projects, but no public GitHub commits, pull requests, or new repositories.
